mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_award WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY award_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_award (student_id, type, award_name, award_level, award_date, issuing_authority, description, import_user_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{type}, #{awardName}, #{awardLevel}, #{awardDate}, #{issuingAuthority}, #{description}, #{importUserId})

INSERT INTO student_award (student_id, type, award_name, award_level, award_date, issuing_authority, description, import_user_id) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.type}, #{item.awardName}, #{item.awardLevel}, #{item.awardDate}, #{item.issuingAuthority}, #{item.description}, #{item.importUserId})
